title: Kemi, Lapland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kemi, Lapland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kemi is a city in Lapland with a population of 21,000. A Lapland port city on the Gulf of Bothnia, known for its snow castle, icebreaker cruises, and paper industry.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
